notes:

notes:
Overall this game runs perfectly without any tweaking. FPS: 60+. 
Minor issues:

1) Game crashed 2 times, but I don't know if it's game or proton fault (they are completely random)

title: ACE COMBAT™ 7: SKIES UNKNOWN

notes:
Dynamic loading of assets causes severe and continuous framerate hitching, forcing the game to play catch-up. This is most prominent when free-looking around the aircraft, and when firing missiles or dropping flares; this is game-breaking as you lose control of the aircraft during the hitch.
On a lesser note, audio and video is desynchronized. This is particularly noticeable in the in-engine cutscenes of 'Charge Attack'.

notes: Played only singleplayer. No issues whatsoever except a 2-3 second stutter the very first time I started a mission as it (likely) compiled shaders. Gameplay was smooth throughout afterwards for the 13 hours I've played.

notes: With the sole exception of the main menu freezing for about 15-30 seconds immediately after pressing Enter/Start (compiling shaders, maybe?
